chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD M.A No. 09 of 2001 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For further orders in view of Court order dated 04.12.2015. 19.10.2016. None present. -.-.-. From the order sheets, it appears that vide order dated 04.12.2015 the applicant side was directed to file the amended title for bringing the legal heirs of respondents. Till date compliance of the order has not been made and on last date of hearing, that is, 23.05.2016 two weeks’ time was sought for compliance. Today, none is present nor the compliance has been made. This is a Miscellaneous Appeal of year 2001, which is being unnecessarily lingering on. Consequently, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ali Haider
